item.title: Farming techniques that amazed me. Have a nice sunny day !
item.description:
Hedge trimming.
Tree grafting technique.
Mahachanok mango I need.
Satisfying Scythe mowing.
Sheepdog clears a traffic jam.
Emptying a cotton picker.
Farmer using a plastic bag to slow down the flow of water so the soil absorbs it more effectively.
Drop-in pitch tray transporter.
Plow blades cutting into the soil.
Onions Harvesting.
How carrots are harvested.
This is a process of harvesting cherries.
Unloading and cleaning watermelons.
This farmhand cutting off banana hands from the stem.
Juicing Made Easy.
How farmed fish are fed.
Yew clipping.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: Soon to be ruined by mankind
item.description: A pristine, untouched pool has been discovered 700 feet (213 meters) below ground in Lechuguilla Cave, New Mexico, one of the world’s largest and most famous caves. This “virgin” pool, entirely untouched by humans, lies deep within a cave system renowned for its immense depth and towering chambers. Scientists have described the pool as “completely pristine,” highlighting the unique bacteria in its waters that are believed to have evolved without any human interference. Surrounded by white frosted rock, the pool has an almost otherworldly appearance. Although its water seems to have a creamy, murky tint, this is merely an optical illusion.
item.dc:creator: clemdarkstarzero

item.title: So many fresh(ish) memes
item.dc:creator: ShaggyRootsAgain

item.title: BOROWITZ: "Certificate of participation.”
item.description: OSLO (The Borowitz Report)—Donald J. Trump reportedly “exploded with rage” on Tuesday after the Norwegian Nobel Committee awarded the 2025 Peace Prize to California Governor Gavin Newsom. In its official statement, the Nobel committee praised Newsom for “demonstrating his dedication to the principle of peace by preventing an armed conflict between California and Oregon.” Though the committee did not bestow its prize on Trump, it did recognize him with a laser printed “certificate of participation.” “Deciding who will win the Peace Prize is an exhausting and stressful process,” the committee stated. “Donald Trump’s entry gave us many hours of welcome laughter.”
item.dc:creator: JasonM1

item.title: The Politics of Existing

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1487 (okay donuts)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
A scene from an Islamic manuscript of al-Farabi's "Conference of the Birds" featuring Ravens and their king.
Sad bowl is sad.
They 'aight donuts.
Harlan's Red-tailed Hawk
The size of the smallest pterosaur that we know of.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "I'm a good boy" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: GovBrief Today #249
item.description: They're bulldozing constraints while starving our protections. Troops are moving toward Chicago, and Trump threatens Portland and the courts with the Insurrection Act. Down in Florida, the DOJ admits that not everyone locked up in the Everglades was subject to deportation. And in California, the Hollywood-Burbank Airport's control tower sat unmanned for six hours because controllers aren't getting paid. Trump loves the shutdown. He just named the 7th person to lead the IRS this year, and it's only October. There are fewer people to say no, fewer watchdogs, and much less resistance. Document what you see. Share one story completely with someone who isn't as attuned to this as you are. There's no more time for people who "just don't want to talk politics." This is survival. Don't leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-insurrection-act-threat [2] https://go.govbrief.today/covid-vaccine-mmrv-changes [3] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-gov-open-healthcare [4] https://go.govbrief.today/deportation-dispute-eswatini [5] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-fl-wrong-detainees [6] https://go.govbrief.today/seattle-shelter-vacancies-hotel [7] https://go.govbrief.today/navajo-coal-bid [8] https://go.govbrief.today/solar-for-all-suit [9] https://go.govbrief.today/ambler-mining-road-alaska [10] https://go.govbrief.today/utah-map-redraw-legislature [11] https://go.govbrief.today/wi-voter-rolls-check [12] https://go.govbrief.today/ted-cruz-wikipedia-letter [13] https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-press-rules-relaxed [14] https://go.govbrief.today/social-security-head-irs [15] https://go.govbrief.today/treasury-defends-trump-coin [16] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-troops-illinois-status [17] https://go.govbrief.today/xinish-doj-abrego-garcia [18] https://go.govbrief.today/maxwell-supreme-court-appeal [19] https://go.govbrief.today/hollywood-burbank-airport-traffic [20] https://go.govbrief.today/ap-disputes-trump-claims Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Back on later to catch up on yesterday's comments. Have an amazing Tuesday!
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
